texto: They will also tell you how far along we are along the depletion curve; the optimists among them will even claim that there is nothing to worry about, because we have two or three decades of production left at the current level. It is to be expected that we will run out of fossil fuels before we run out of optimists, who are, along with fools and madmen, a renewable resource.
explicacao: Citação de Dmitry Orlov sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “They will also tell you how far along we are along the depletion curve; the optimists among them …” articula reflexao, optimism, along em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
